author: y4rr
content:
Closed APPROVE-WITH-FOLLOW-UPS — measurement dispatch produced 0 PASS / 5 FAIL with concrete diagnoses.

Artifacts added:
- ferrotorch-vision/examples/inference_dump.rs — Rust binary loads pretrained model + runs forward + dumps output tensor.
- scripts/verify_pretrained_inference.py — Python orchestrator runs torchvision reference + invokes Rust binary + compares within per-output-type tolerances.
- ferrotorch-vision/tests/probe_pretrained_inference_1139.rs — #[ignore]-gated wrapper test.

Per-model verdicts:
- SSD300: FAIL (max_abs_score=0.054; missing NMS top-k caps; HIGH-confidence diagnosis)
- FasterRCNN: FAIL (forward discards box_deltas, returns RPN proposals; structural postprocess gap; HIGH)
- MaskRCNN: FAIL (inherits FasterRCNN + missing mask postprocess; HIGH)
- DeepLabV3: FAIL (half-magnitude logits with sign flips; argmax 67-96%; MED — needs per-layer bisect)
- FCN: FAIL (same as DeepLabV3; MED)

Sabotage probe validated comparison framework (class-axis-roll caught; uniform halve preserved argmax correctly).

Follow-on dispatches filed:
- #1140 — SSD300 NMS top-k caps (MED)
- #1141 — FasterRCNN/MaskRCNN RoIHeads postprocess (HIGH, ~1000-1500 LoC)
- #1142 — DeepLabV3/FCN logit-magnitude bisection (MED, investigation)

User directive: take all three in sequence.
